card_description: James-James is a divine or mythological figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 18 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick identifies Zebra with the Noosphere (Teilhard de Chardin) and proposes that this "Collective Mind" (Corpus Christi) is building itself *backward* in time from the Omega Point."
